title: lanium microphyllum
intro: Lanium microphyllum, also known as American valerian or valerian, is a perennial plant native to North America with a long history of medicinal use. The plant's rhizomes and roots contain compounds with sedative, antispasmodic, and analgesic properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of Lanium microphyllum include improved sleep quality, reduced muscle tension, and relief from menstrual cramps and other pain-related issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce symptoms of restlessness and irritability.
